title: Junior Business Development Manager at Inorbit Malls

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Inorbit Malls
jsonLd.description:
Inorbit Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Inorbit Malls:
Inorbit Malls is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Inorbit Malls!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
